data.name: AddTrainerRequired
data.value: Please select a coach.

data.name: CancelEventAthleteRequired
data.value: Cancelling an event registration requires a signed-in athlete.

data.name: CancelEventNotRegistered
data.value: You are not registered for this event.

data.name: CourseNotFound
data.value: The course was not found.

data.name: CreateCourseEndBeforeStart
data.value: The course end date cannot be before the start date.

data.name: CreateCourseNameRequired
data.value: A course needs a name.

data.name: CreateCourseTrainerRequired
data.value: A course needs a signed-in coach.

data.name: DateEndAfterStart
data.value: The date end time must be after the start time.

data.name: DateNotFound
data.value: The date was not found.

data.name: DateTitleRequired
data.value: A date needs a title.

data.name: DeleteCourseCreatorOnly
data.value: Only the coach who created this course can delete it.

data.name: EventEndAfterStart
data.value: The event end time must be after the start time.

data.name: EventNotFound
data.value: The event was not found.

data.name: EventTitleRequired
data.value: An event needs a title.

data.name: JoinCourseAthleteRequired
data.value: Joining a course requires a signed-in athlete.

data.name: LeaveCourseAthleteRequired
data.value: Leaving a course requires a signed-in athlete.

data.name: LeaveCourseNotJoined
data.value: You have not joined this course.

data.name: PermissionManageEvents
data.value: You are not allowed to manage dates and events for this course.

data.name: PermissionManagePlans
data.value: You are not allowed to manage training plans for this course.

data.name: PermissionManageTrainers
data.value: You are not allowed to manage this course's coaches.

data.name: RegisterEventAthleteRequired
data.value: Event registration requires a signed-in athlete.

data.name: RegisterEventDeadlinePassed
data.value: The registration deadline for this event has passed.

data.name: RegisterEventFull
data.value: No spots are available for this event.

data.name: RegisterEventRequiresEnrollment
data.value: You must join the course before registering for events.

data.name: RemoveTrainerLeadCannotLeave
data.value: The course lead can delete the course, but cannot leave it.

data.name: RemoveTrainerNotAssigned
data.value: This coach is not assigned to the course.

data.name: RoleCourseLead
data.value: Course lead

data.name: RoleTrainer
data.value: Coach

data.name: TrainingPlanNotFound
data.value: The training plan was not found.

data.name: TrainingPlanRequired
data.value: Please select a training plan.
